subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
